title: Looking for moday experts to help with automation using formalues
excerpt: We have a few things to complete and make Monday more fine for use. Looking for some experts who can help with this. Learn and try phase is over for us

posts.author: PikMykid (ceekay)
posts.cookedHtml: We have a few things to complete and make Monday more fine for use. Looking for some experts who can help with this. Learn and try phase is over for us

posts.author: LucaOmnidea (Luca Carraro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @PikMykid ,

Luca from Italy here, very nice to meet you! I’m a Customer Success Manager from Omnidea, one of the oldest monday.com partners.

Feel free to drop me an email to schedule a quick call: luca.carraro@omnidea.it

Have a great day

posts.author: jennaioi (Jenna Mac Killop)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you are still looking for assistance we would love to talk to you about monday.com.
We can schedule a 30-minute intro call with you this week. Feel free to reach out to me and my monday.com team at jenna.mackillop@iointegration.com.

posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @PikMykid,

First of all, I would like to welcome you to the monday .com community! If you are looking for seasoned monday professionals who can help you with automation, I would like to suggest you get in touch with certified monday consultants. With the help of a monday.com consultant, you can automate manual and repetitive tasks with ease.

Regards
Neelam B
